indicator_description: Goods and services sold to buyers in other countries.
Purchases of goods and services from abroad.

indicator_name: External balance of goods and services
indicator_description: The difference between exports and imports of both goods and services. A positive value indicates a trade surplus; a negative value a trade deficit.

Gross domestic product reflects the total income earned through the production of goods and services in an economic territory during an accounting period. It can be measured in three different ways: using either the expenditure approach, the income approach, or the production approach.
